title: Torrezx-Trim horse
description: add armor trims horse,replace armor horse
body:
Torrezx-Trim horse

ESPAÑOL-Las armaduras de caballo ahora apareceran con trims,escoge entre 3 variantes 

reemplaza las armaduras de caballos de hierro-oro-diamante,por armaduras de netherite

con trims agregados.

ENGLISH-Horse armor will now appear with trims, choose between 3 variants

Replaces iron-gold-diamond horse armor with netherite armor

with added trims.
